languages.text: "Поиски Эоганна нельзя откладывать. Благодарю за бдительность, Вигдис".
"The search for Eogunn cannot be delayed. Thank you for your vigilance, Vigdis."
languages.original_text: "Поиски Эоганна нельзя откладывать. Благодарю за бдительность, Вигдис".

traits.locale_text: "The search for Eo-gann cannot be delayed. Thank you for your vigilance, Vigdis."
"The search for Eo-gann cannot be delayed. Thank you for your vigilance, Vigdis."
"The search for Eo-gann cannot be delayed. Thank you for your vigilance, Vigdis."

languages.text: 「エオガンを探し出すことは、もう待てない。ヴィグディス、君の警戒に感謝する」
languages.original_text: "The search for Eogunn cannot be delayed. Thank you for your vigilance, Vigdis."

traits.locale_text: 「エオ・ガンを探し出すことは、もう待てない。ヴィグディス、君の警戒に感謝する。」

languages.text: «No podemos retrasar la búsqueda de Eogunn. Gracias por estar atenta, Vigdis».
languages.original_text: "The search for Eogunn cannot be delayed. Thank you for your vigilance, Vigdis."

traits.locale_text: «No podemos retrasar la búsqueda de Eo-gann. Gracias por estar atenta, Vigdis».

languages.text: "Die Suche nach Eogunn kann nicht warten. Danke für Eure Wachsamkeit, Vigdis."
languages.original_text: "The search for Eogunn cannot be delayed. Thank you for your vigilance, Vigdis."

traits.locale_text: "Die Suche nach Eo-gann kann nicht warten. Danke für Eure Wachsamkeit, Vigdis."

languages.text: « Nous devons nous lancer à sa recherche sans attendre. Merci pour votre vigilance, Vigdis. »
languages.original_text: "The search for Eogunn cannot be delayed. Thank you for your vigilance, Vigdis."

traits.locale_text: « Nous devons nous lancer à sa recherche sans attendre. Merci pour votre vigilance, Vigdis. »

languages.text: “对伊奥贡的搜寻不可拖延。感谢你的警觉，维格迪斯。”
languages.original_text: "The search for Eogunn cannot be delayed. Thank you for your vigilance, Vigdis."

traits.locale_text: “对埃欧-甘的搜寻不可拖延。感谢你的警觉，维格迪斯。”

languages.text: "Eogunn'ın aranması geciktirilemez. Dikkatin için teşekkürler Vigdis."
languages.original_text: "The search for Eogunn cannot be delayed. Thank you for your vigilance, Vigdis."

traits.locale_text: "Eo-gann'ın aranması geciktirilemez. Dikkatin için teşekkürler Vigdis."
